yellow.usage: Headlines, graffiti text, UI accents, duotone highlights, banner elements

charcoal.usage: Subject attire, text on yellow, deep background blocks, black-level shadows

grey.usage: Studio backgrounds, grey floor/blocks, secondary typography, number numerals

headlines.treatment: Graffiti street-style for manifesto/posters; clean geometric for editorial

quotes_body.treatment: Duotone split over portrait; left-aligned; tight leading

branding_labels.treatment: Technical/data aesthetic — coordinates, dates, edition numbers

name_episode.treatment: Small, grey — secondary hierarchy below main headline

layout_rules.sandwich_layering: Subject placed BETWEEN typography layers — text behind and/or in front of subject creating Z-axis depth and 3D pop-out effect
layout_rules.rule_of_thirds: Subject eyes on upper horizontal third for portraits; centered for manifesto posters
layout_rules.symmetry: Centered horizontal axis for hero/poster compositions; offset for layered editorial
layout_rules.framing: Hard-edge rectangular masks/windows revealing duotone-processed subject; surveillance/ID scanner frame overlay on profile images
layout_rules.negative_space: Heavy negative space with flat matte backgrounds — no distracting elements

photo_types.poster: Full-body or waist-up subject, centered, yellow/grey split background, headline overlaid in sandwich composition
photo_types.quote_card: Portrait duotone (yellow highlight + charcoal shadow), left-aligned bold quote text, flat grey background with fine grain
photo_types.thumbnail: Episode number (massive grey '01' etc.), yellow top field, grey floor, subject in lower 2/3, Rubik's cube icon bottom-right
photo_types.banner: Subject masked out and composited — 'FROM PARIS WITH LOVE' yellow type behind/around subject, industrial monospace labels
photo_types.diagram: Isometric staircase/step metaphor, yellow accent on step highlights, grey/white structure, heavy sans-serif headers in yellow blocks
photo_types.profile: Surveillance/ID scanner frame over eyes, dark textured background, yellow headers, right-aligned experience details

backgrounds.studio_flat: Solid #939598 grey — matte, no gradient, used for poster/quote cards
backgrounds.industrial_gradient: Sharp horizontal split — yellow top field (#F2E600) meets grey floor (#A6A6AB) at image center — 'limbo' effect
backgrounds.textured_grey: Dark charcoal with heavy asphalt/brushed-metal noise grain — for profile/dossier style
backgrounds.distressed_poster: Fine film grain over flat grey — subtle radial vignette, paper-like tactility
backgrounds.geometric_shapes: Large dark grey/black geometric polygons — diagonal composition for depth, flat matte finish

color_grading.contrast: High — yellow vs. charcoal creates maximum pop; grey mid-tones prevent harshness
color_grading.saturation: Yellow pushed to maximum saturation; skin tones heavily desaturated to prevent competing with yellow; grey backgrounds low-chroma
color_grading.finish: Matte — no glossy reflections, no gradients, no drop shadows on flat elements
color_grading.skin_tones: Desaturated, cool-leaning — prevents competition with high-saturation yellow
color_grading.duotone_mapping: Highlights mapped to #F2E331/#FDE910 yellow; shadows mapped to #1A1A1B charcoal; mid-tones to grey
color_grading.black_levels: Lifted/charcoal rather than pure black — matte effect on dark clothing

effects.distress_filters: Fine film grain / noise overlay on grey backgrounds — subtle, tactile quality
effects.gaussian_blur: Background elements (outside mask) slightly blurred — portrait inside mask sharp
effects.sharpening: Applied to foreground text and duotone-masked subject
effects.focus_rectangle: Hard-edge rectangular clipping mask reveals high-contrast duotone subject — 'digital lens' / 'AI vision' aesthetic
effects.flat_shading: Isometric cube and diagram use flat color blocking only — no bevels or gradients
effects.film_grain: Very fine grain on quote card backgrounds — gives paper-like quality, prevents plastic flatness
effects.graffiti_drips: Wet paint drip effect on street-style headline text — organic detail in digital composition
effects.scan_line: Thin horizontal scan line through eye-frame on profile images — 'surveillance/dossier' motif

subject.identity: Joe Perkins — middle-aged, groomed beard, short hair with tattoos visible
subject.attire: Black t-shirt and joggers (charcoal lifted blacks); tan high-top sneakers on some images
subject.pose: Direct gaze / confrontational eye contact; relaxed but authoritative; seated on black stool for studio shots
subject.expression: Serious, unblinking, stern — 'call to action' energy; never smiling

rubiks_cube.description: Isometric 3x3 Rubik's Cube — yellow active stickers on grey/charcoal inactive stickers. Often arranges yellows to form a blocky number (e.g. '1') wrapping the cube corner.
rubiks_cube.usage: Brand icon / episode numbering / 'complexity/systems' metaphor — appears in poster corners, as watermark, in brand guidelines

barcode.description: Not observed as active icon — but industrial/monospace typography evokes barcode aesthetic

assets.hook: Isometric Rubik's cube with yellow '1' sticker pattern — minimal, analytical
FROM PARIS WITH LOVE brand book — 4-column grid: palette, type, logo, imagery
SAVE OUR DREAM graffiti over studio portrait, surveillance scanner overlay
AI IS THE NEW UI — rectangular 'AI lens' mask reveal with duotone yellow/black subject
FROM PARIS WITH LOVE — full sandwich layering with t-shirt tech text
Yellow/grey split background, massive grey '01', Rubik's cube icon, Joe Perkins seated
OPENCLAW KEY SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE — isometric 5-step staircase
assets.style: Brutalist-industrial technical diagram, yellow step highlights

assets.hook: 'THE ONLY PEOPLE WHO GETTHINGS DONE ARE PEOPLE WHO GETTINGRADE DONE' — typographic poster
assets.style: Swiss flat design, yellow on muted lavender-grey, film grain

assets.hook: PROFILE / JOE PERKINS — scanner eye-frame, dark textured background, Smartly/Meta/TikTok

do: Use yellow (#FDE910 to #F2E600) as primary accent — never muted or dirty
Use charcoal (#1A1A1B) instead of pure black
Use grey (#939598 range) as primary background — never pure white
Apply sandwich layering — subject between typography on Z-axis
Keep finish matte — no glossy reflections
Desaturate skin tones heavily to prevent competition with yellow
Use heavy geometric sans-serif (Inter/Helvetica/Impact) in ALL CAPS for headlines
Include Rubik's cube icon to symbolize systems/complexity
Apply fine film grain to flat grey backgrounds for tactile quality
Use hard-edge rectangular masks for duotone subject reveals
never: Use pure white (#FFFFFF) as a background
Use gradient backgrounds on poster/quote cards — keep flat
Apply drop shadows or bevels — flat design only
Make subject look happy — serious, authoritative, confrontational
Use more than 3 primary colors — restricted palette only
Put text directly on photo without masking — always sandwich-layer
